status: pre-registered; owner funded full grid; arms priced; grid cleared by gate
question: Does the full /decide panel beat a token-budget-matched unstructured deliberation baseline on decision quality?

arms.B: cost-matched unstructured: deliberate thoroughly / multiple perspectives / argue against yourself, token budget = arm C's median pilot spend (no roles, no structure)
arms.C: full /decide: plugin loaded, panel runs; subagent spawn allowed for this arm only (pre-registered hermetic deviation, pilot-gated per ADR 0052)

bar.keep_condition: mean_delta(fraction_met_C - fraction_met_B) > 0, clustered by scenario (8 clusters); 95% CI reported as confidence signal (strong/weak), not a gate
bar.context_only: C vs A reported, never the KEEP basis; C>A with C~B = plugin buys tokens not structure, recorded and routed to its own /decide
bar.verdict_fn: lib/verdict.py:verdict_of on the clustered C-B delta
bar.scoring: fraction-met over 4 expectations/cell, met_final = min(grader, prosecutor) (ADR 0025)

cost.pilot: 2-3 arm-C cells on B1, cap ~$6; must show the deny-list carve-out hit and resolved with isolation preserved (ADR 0052 weakest assumption)
cost.gate: python3 ../lib/cost_gate.py --cells 72 --pilot-cost-usd <cA> <cB> <cC> --ceiling-usd 300 (one measured cost per arm; equal arm sizes make the uniform mean exactly the arm-mix projection)
cost.pilot_note: r1/r2 stalled on a build defect (working-tree-only corpus deletion; fixed: build_b1.py now commits the removal) and on default-denied writes (fixed: bypassPermissions); r3 ran the full panel at $9.07. Pilot total $10.10 — overshot the ~$6 cap by one cell (a cell's cost is unknowable until it completes; the cap stops the NEXT cell). Gate: projected $242-653 for 72 cells vs $40 — OVER, grid HALTED per ADR 0052; scope decision with the owner.
cost.ceiling_basis: owner decision 2026-07-12 (AskUserQuestion on the gate firing): fund the full pre-registered 8x3x3 grid; $300 covers the ~$264 arm-mix estimate (C 24x$9.07 + B/A measured below) with headroom. Supersedes the ADR-pinned $40 whose gate fired; recorded in ADR 0052 decision 3.

blinding.normalizer: lib/blind.py neutral schema {decision, options, criterion, risks, assumptions}
blinding.audit: guess-the-arm on 9 sampled normalized cells; accuracy significantly above 0.5 = leak -> ADR 0052 revisit trigger

sequencing: ADR 0052 decision 2: plumbing pilot -> Instrument 1 grid -> this cost-pilot -> this grid
